name: Perpetual Loop Factory
summary: Spawn self-correcting perpetual frame chains for any append-only artifact (novel, codebase, score, knowledge base). One agent contains the entire pattern as embedded templates: rotating twin council, diversity sidecar, pump + pulse + dashboard daemons. One spawn call instantiates everything locally.
tagline: Drop one .py — get a four-brainstem self-correcting infinite loop.
